Roxy Palace Casino

We have been giving our players superb online casino services since 2002, and that’s not a feat any other casino can boast about. There are countless reasons why Roxy Palace has stayed strong for more than a decade. It’s not just because of our 5-star service but because of all our loyal customers. The combination of our games, bonuses, and banking options that cover both fiat and Bitcoin makes gaming with Roxy Palace worthwhile. Hence, that’s why we want to urge you to be a part of our community. Once you join us, you’re in for a truckload of new gaming experiences and winnings!

Your Favourite Roxy Palace Casino Game

We offer our players over 500 Roxy Palace games, giving each and everyone a chance to win real cash prizes. Brought to you by the trusted software provider Microgaming, it is no surprise why we have such a high payout rate of 96%.

Need proof? Check our Winner’s Page and read how we’ve listed our worldwide winners who’ve won from different games such as Premier Roulette Diamond Edition, Football Star, Leagues of Fortune, Atlantic City Blackjack Gold, Munchkins, MP Baccarat (Diamond), and Asian Beauty. Clearly, you can win not just through Roxy Palace slots or card games!

With so many different options with us, you’ll never run out of turns to win! When you don’t “feel” one game, you can simply pick another and another! However, you’ll never know how exciting it is to win real money unless you create your own real money account.

Once you join us, you wouldn’t want to miss out on any of our weekly or monthly promotions! When you’ve made a Real Money account with us, you’ll get updates about the latest deals and offers through your email. However, it’s a must to make sure that our emails are marked “safe” in your inbox so that the best promos don’t end up wasted in your junk folder.

Check our Most Popular Games

As of the writing of this, our popular Mega Moolah progressive jackpot is currently earning over £/€/$3 million as you read this. Don’t you want to know what it feels like to read your name in a list of winners as mentioned above? Try your luck and strike it big by playing our other games such as Game of Thrones, Terminator 2, Premier Roulette, and Mermaids Millions.

Be sure to keep visiting our casino to make sure you won’t miss out on any of our newest releases. We always have something in store for our loyal players, so register at Roxy Palace Casino now!

Play via Mobile

If you want to add more cash to your account, how about an easy £/€/$25? Make your deposit via Roxy Palace mobile to get this extra bonus! Our mobile app is available to download for Android and Apple users for FREE! You can play exciting games such as Thunderstruck, Tomb Raider, Avalon, Mega Moolah, and Cash Splash.

While you’re playing on our mobile app, why don’t you go ahead and add us on Facebook? You can also follow us on Twitter. Our social media sites will give you updates on the latest promos and bonuses. Get in touch with us at Roxy Palace Casino!

The Roxy Palace Welcome Bonus

Make your first deposit now and you won’t regret it! In fact, we’ll give you a 1st deposit bonus of 100% up to £/€/$150. You can use this extra cash to explore how awesome Roxy Palace Casino is. We are so confident that you’ll have that much fun that you’ll immediately make a second deposit. Fear not because we’ll still give you a 100% match bonus up to £/€/$200!

Wouldn’t you want to earn as much as £/€/$350 worth of cash…for free? Surely, you’d be more motivated to actually play in the casino more wholeheartedly when you know the stakes are on us! Do you think you have what it takes to win against the house? Download Roxy Palace by clicking the Roxy Palace Casino download button and find out!

Payments are just as easy getting your payout

Knowing that we have players from all over the world, we have prepared convenient Roxy Palace Casino payment methods for you. You can deposit through the following trusted financial institutions like Visa, MasterCard, Visa Debit Card, and Maestro Casino. We also have alternative payment options like Bank Transfer, ClickandBuy, EcoCard, Entropay, Moneybookers, Neteller, PaySafeCard, UKash, Voucher, and PayPal. Just like our countless games, so do we offer different modes of transaction in Roxy Palace.

Meanwhile, Roxy Palace also caters to Bitcoin users via our Bitcoin-accepting payment processors. Just head to our banking options and see which processors can cater to your digital coins. Convert your coins to playing funds and be one of the lucky jackpot winners. Just like any Bitcoin casino, Roxy Palace can offer the fun, entertainment, and convenience of Bitcoin payments.

Why don’t you give Roxy Palace a chance? You know we’re going to return the favour to you and more! Let us prove why we’re not just like any other casino. Join Roxy Palace Casino and see all the difference yourself.

Register now!

The Roxy Palace Casino Loyalty Tiers

Your initial deposit with us automatically grants you instant membership to Roxy Palace’s Loyalty Tiers. This is where all Real Money players are given special entries to prize draws for new games. Save for the basic member tier, the following superior tiers are bound to enjoy Roxy Palace’s maximised perks and bonuses.

  • Silver: With a deposit of £/€/$2,000, you will now be part of the Silver Tier. You will get 10% bonus points, 1-star loyalty point specials, an estimated £/€/$1,000 Roxy Palace bonus per month, and your own birthday bonus.
  • Gold: Gain entry to the Gold Tier by depositing £/€/$4,000. You can maintain your golden status by maintaining 3,600 points. You will also get 20% bonus points, 2-star loyalty point specials, £/€/$6,500 bonus per month, free entries to super slots tournaments, and get immediate access at our newly released games. To top you off, we are also giving you a calendar filled with Roxy Palace promotions!
  • Platinum: Deposit a minimum of £/€/$8,000 to be on top of the food chain. You will get all above benefits, with increased maintenance points of 6,400. 40% bonus points, £/€/$10,000 monthly bonus, an exclusive VIP Club invitation, and finally, your very own exclusive support number.

So, the more you play at Roxy Palace Casino, the more club points you’ll earn. Once you’ve accumulated big club points, you can trade this for casino cash. Simply said, they value loyalty in Roxy Palace Casino, and they’re more than willing to reward you the moment you make your first deposit!

Customer service friendly, live chat always available for help.

joes

I must say I’m very impressed with Roxy Palace Casino. I found my experience to be smooth and without issue. Both the website and downloadable client ran without a single hitch and everything was very attractive and user friendly to navigate. This coupled with its excellent customer service, Live Support and prompt response times to my inquires made the experience simply marvelous.

Astaroth

I had a good time at Roxy Palace casino. I liked the variety of games and the casino room. I used instant play and it worked surprisingly fast, no technical problems appeared, so I didn’t have the need to contact the customer support. I think it’s great that they also have live casino, so I think I’ll deposit there sometime and try the live games. From the time I spent there, I think it is a trustworthy casino.

Privacy Policy

Privacy Policy          Terms & Conditions

Gamble Responsibly: Gambling should be a fun and exciting activity enjoyed with care and control. Set a budget, and never wager more than you can afford to lose. If it stops feeling fun or starts to cause worry, seek help from trusted support groups. Before you play, check the casino’s rules and terms so you know what to expect and can enjoy your experience.
